Services About Resources Get Started

Music therapy can be powerful. Here are five tips:

  • Tip 1: Listen intentionally
  • Tip 2: Use rhythm to regulate
  • Tip 3: Engage with instruments
  • Tip 4: Practice regularly
  • Tip 5: Reflect on your experience

Enjoy the journey!

Ready to start your journey?
